1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"errors"
     6→	"os"
     7→	"testing"
     8→	"time"
     9→
    10→	"github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/api/arf"
    11→	"github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/common"
    12→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    13→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
    14→)
    15→
    16→func TestSelfHealConfig_Parsing(t *testing.T) {
    17→	tests := []struct {
    18→		name        string
    19→		yamlContent string
    20→		expected    *SelfHealConfig
    21→		expectError bool
    22→	}{
    23→		{
    24→			name: "valid self heal config",
    25→			yamlContent: `version: v1alpha1
    26→id: test-workflow
    27→target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
    28→base_ref: refs/heads/main
    29→self_heal:
    30→  max_retries: 3
    31→  cooldown: 30s
    32→  enabled: true
    33→steps:
    34→  - type: recipe
    35→    id: test-recipe
    36→    engine: openrewrite
    37→    recipes:
    38→      - com.acme.Recipe`,
    39→			expected: &SelfHealConfig{
    40→				MaxRetries: 3,
    41→				Cooldown:   "30s",
    42→				Enabled:    true,
    43→			},
    44→			expectError: false,
    45→		},
    46→		{
    47→			name: "self heal disabled",
    48→			yamlContent: `version: v1alpha1
    49→id: test-workflow
    50→target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
    51→base_ref: refs/heads/main
    52→self_heal:
    53→  enabled: false
    54→steps:
    55→  - type: recipe
    56→    id: test-recipe
    57→    engine: openrewrite
    58→    recipes:
    59→      - com.acme.Recipe`,
    60→			expected: &SelfHealConfig{
    61→				MaxRetries: 1,  // default
    62→				Cooldown:   "", // default
    63→				Enabled:    false,
    64→			},
    65→			expectError: false,
    66→		},
    67→		{
    68→			name: "no self heal config uses defaults",
    69→			yamlContent: `version: v1alpha1
    70→id: test-workflow
    71→target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
    72→base_ref: refs/heads/main
    73→steps:
    74→  - type: recipe
    75→    id: test-recipe
    76→    engine: openrewrite
    77→    recipes:
    78→      - com.acme.Recipe`,
    79→			expected: &SelfHealConfig{
    80→				MaxRetries: 1,    // default
    81→				Cooldown:   "",   // default
    82→				Enabled:    true, // default
    83→			},
    84→			expectError: false,
    85→		},
    86→		{
    87→			name: "invalid max_retries",
    88→			yamlContent: `version: v1alpha1
    89→id: test-workflow
    90→target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
    91→base_ref: refs/heads/main
    92→self_heal:
    93→  max_retries: -1
    94→  enabled: true
    95→steps:
    96→  - type: recipe
    97→    id: test-recipe
    98→    engine: openrewrite
    99→    recipes:
   100→      - com.acme.Recipe`,
   101→			expected:    nil,
   102→			expectError: true,
   103→		},
   104→		{
   105→			name: "invalid cooldown format",
   106→			yamlContent: `version: v1alpha1
   107→id: test-workflow
   108→target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
   109→base_ref: refs/heads/main
   110→self_heal:
   111→  max_retries: 2
   112→  cooldown: invalid
   113→  enabled: true
   114→steps:
   115→  - type: recipe
   116→    id: test-recipe
   117→    engine: openrewrite
   118→    recipes:
   119→      - com.acme.Recipe`,
   120→			expected:    nil,
   121→			expectError: true,
   122→		},
   123→	}
   124→
   125→	for _, tt := range tests {
   126→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   127→			// This will fail until we implement the parsing
   128→			config, err := parseTestConfigYAML(tt.yamlContent)
   129→
   130→			if tt.expectError {
   131→				assert.Error(t, err)
   132→				assert.Nil(t, config)
   133→			} else {
   134→				assert.NoError(t, err)
   135→				require.NotNil(t, config)
   136→				assert.Equal(t, tt.expected, config.SelfHeal)
   137→			}
   138→		})
   139→	}
   140→}
   141→
   142→func TestSelfHealConfig_Validation(t *testing.T) {
   143→	tests := []struct {
   144→		name        string
   145→		config      *SelfHealConfig
   146→		expectError bool
   147→		errorMsg    string
   148→	}{
   149→		{
   150→			name: "valid config",
   151→			config: &SelfHealConfig{
   152→				MaxRetries: 2,
   153→				Cooldown:   "30s",
   154→				Enabled:    true,
   155→			},
   156→			expectError: false,
   157→		},
   158→		{
   159→			name: "negative max_retries",
   160→			config: &SelfHealConfig{
   161→				MaxRetries: -1,
   162→				Enabled:    true,
   163→			},
   164→			expectError: true,
   165→			errorMsg:    "max_retries cannot be negative",
   166→		},
   167→		{
   168→			name: "excessive max_retries",
   169→			config: &SelfHealConfig{
   170→				MaxRetries: 10,
   171→				Enabled:    true,
   172→			},
   173→			expectError: true,
   174→			errorMsg:    "max_retries cannot exceed 5",
   175→		},
   176→		{
   177→			name: "invalid cooldown format",
   178→			config: &SelfHealConfig{
   179→				MaxRetries: 2,
   180→				Cooldown:   "invalid",
   181→				Enabled:    true,
   182→			},
   183→			expectError: true,
   184→			errorMsg:    "invalid cooldown format",
   185→		},
   186→	}
   187→
   188→	for _, tt := range tests {
   189→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   190→			err := tt.config.Validate()
   191→
   192→			if tt.expectError {
   193→				assert.Error(t, err)
   194→				if tt.errorMsg != "" {
   195→					assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), tt.errorMsg)
   196→				}
   197→			} else {
   198→				assert.NoError(t, err)
   199→			}
   200→		})
   201→	}
   202→}
   203→
   204→func TestTransflowHealingAttempt_Creation(t *testing.T) {
   205→	tests := []struct {
   206→		name             string
   207→		attemptNumber    int
   208→		errorContext     arf.ErrorContext
   209→		suggestedRecipes []string
   210→		expected         *TransflowHealingAttempt
   211→	}{
   212→		{
   213→			name:          "simple healing attempt",
   214→			attemptNumber: 1,
   215→			errorContext: arf.ErrorContext{
   216→				ErrorMessage: "compilation failed",
   217→				ErrorType:    "compilation",
   218→				SourceFile:   "Main.java",
   219→			},
   220→			suggestedRecipes: []string{"com.acme.FixCompilation"},
   221→			expected: &TransflowHealingAttempt{
   222→				AttemptNumber: 1,
   223→				ErrorContext: arf.ErrorContext{
   224→					ErrorMessage: "compilation failed",
   225→					ErrorType:    "compilation",
   226→					SourceFile:   "Main.java",
   227→				},
   228→				SuggestedRecipes: []string{"com.acme.FixCompilation"},
   229→				AppliedRecipes:   []string{},
   230→				Success:          false,
   231→				ErrorMessage:     "",
   232→			},
   233→		},
   234→	}
   235→
   236→	for _, tt := range tests {
   237→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   238→			attempt := NewTransflowHealingAttempt(tt.attemptNumber, tt.errorContext, tt.suggestedRecipes)
   239→
   240→			assert.Equal(t, tt.expected.AttemptNumber, attempt.AttemptNumber)
   241→			assert.Equal(t, tt.expected.ErrorContext.ErrorMessage, attempt.ErrorContext.ErrorMessage)
   242→			assert.Equal(t, tt.expected.SuggestedRecipes, attempt.SuggestedRecipes)
   243→			assert.False(t, attempt.Success)
   244→			assert.Empty(t, attempt.AppliedRecipes)
   245→		})
   246→	}
   247→}
   248→
   249→func TestTransflowHealingSummary_Tracking(t *testing.T) {
   250→	summary := NewTransflowHealingSummary(true, 2)
   251→
   252→	// Test initial state
   253→	assert.True(t, summary.Enabled)
   254→	assert.Equal(t, 2, summary.MaxRetries)
   255→	assert.Equal(t, 0, summary.AttemptsCount)
   256→	assert.False(t, summary.FinalSuccess)
   257→	assert.Equal(t, 0, summary.TotalHealed)
   258→	assert.Empty(t, summary.Attempts)
   259→
   260→	// Add healing attempts
   261→	attempt1 := &TransflowHealingAttempt{
   262→		AttemptNumber:    1,
   263→		SuggestedRecipes: []string{"com.acme.FixImports"},
   264→		AppliedRecipes:   []string{"com.acme.FixImports"},
   265→		Success:          false,
   266→		ErrorMessage:     "still failing",
   267→	}
   268→
   269→	attempt2 := &TransflowHealingAttempt{
   270→		AttemptNumber:    2,
   271→		SuggestedRecipes: []string{"com.acme.FixSyntax"},
   272→		AppliedRecipes:   []string{"com.acme.FixSyntax"},
   273→		Success:          true,
   274→	}
   275→
   276→	summary.AddAttempt(attempt1)
   277→	assert.Equal(t, 1, summary.AttemptsCount)
   278→	assert.Equal(t, 0, summary.TotalHealed)
   279→	assert.False(t, summary.FinalSuccess)
   280→
   281→	summary.AddAttempt(attempt2)
   282→	assert.Equal(t, 2, summary.AttemptsCount)
   283→	assert.Equal(t, 1, summary.TotalHealed)
   284→
   285→	summary.SetFinalResult(true)
   286→	assert.True(t, summary.FinalSuccess)
   287→}
   288→
   289→func TestErrorAnalysisIntegration(t *testing.T) {
   290→	// Test error analysis integration (will fail until implemented)
   291→	buildErrors := []string{
   292→		"main.go:15:2: undefined: nonExistentFunction",
   293→		"main.go:20:5: syntax error: unexpected ;",
   294→	}
   295→
   296→	analyzer := NewTransflowErrorAnalyzer()
   297→	suggestions, err := analyzer.AnalyzeBuildFailure(context.Background(), buildErrors, "go")
   298→
   299→	require.NoError(t, err)
   300→	require.NotNil(t, suggestions)
   301→	assert.NotEmpty(t, suggestions.SuggestedRecipes)
   302→	assert.Greater(t, suggestions.Confidence, 0.0)
   303→}
   304→
   305→func TestSelfHealingRunnerFlow(t *testing.T) {
   306→	// Test the complete self-healing flow (will fail until implemented)
   307→	config := &TransflowConfig{
   308→		ID:         "test-healing",
   309→		TargetRepo: "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git",
   310→		BaseRef:    "refs/heads/main",
   311→		SelfHeal: &SelfHealConfig{
   312→			MaxRetries: 2,
   313→			Enabled:    true,
   314→		},
   315→		Steps: []TransflowStep{
   316→			{Type: "recipe", ID: "test-recipe", Engine: "openrewrite", Recipes: []string{"com.test.Recipe"}},
   317→		},
   318→	}
   319→
   320→	// Mock build failure and healing
   321→	mockGit := &MockGitOperations{}
   322→	mockRecipe := &MockRecipeExecutor{}
   323→	mockBuild := NewHealingMockBuildChecker()
   324→	mockBuild.buildResults = []*common.DeployResult{
   325→		{Success: false, Message: "compilation failed: undefined symbol"},
   326→		{Success: true, Message: "build successful", Version: "healed-v1.0.0"},
   327→	}
   328→
   329→	// Create mock job submitter for healing workflow
   330→	mockJobSubmitter := &MockJobSubmitter{
   331→		JobResults: map[string]JobResult{
   332→			"planner": {
   333→				JobID:    "planner-job-1",
   334→				Status:   "completed",
   335→				Duration: 10 * time.Second,
   336→				Output:   `{"plan_id": "plan-123", "options": [{"id": "option-1", "type": "llm-exec"}]}`,
   337→			},
   338→			"llm-exec": {
   339→				JobID:    "llm-exec-job-1",
   340→				Status:   "completed",
   341→				Duration: 30 * time.Second,
   342→				Output:   `{"diff": "successful patch applied"}`,
   343→			},
   344→			"reducer": {
   345→				JobID:    "reducer-job-1",
   346→				Status:   "completed",
   347→				Duration: 5 * time.Second,
   348→				Output:   `{"action": "stop", "notes": "healing succeeded"}`,
   349→			},
   350→		},
   351→	}
   352→
   353→	runner, err := NewTransflowRunner(config, "/tmp/test")
   354→	require.NoError(t, err)
   355→
   356→	runner.SetGitOperations(mockGit)
   357→	runner.SetRecipeExecutor(mockRecipe)
   358→	runner.SetBuildChecker(mockBuild)
   359→	runner.SetJobSubmitter(mockJobSubmitter)
   360→
   361→	// This should trigger self-healing
   362→	ctx := context.Background()
   363→	result, err := runner.Run(ctx)
   364→
   365→	// Should succeed after healing
   366→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   367→	assert.NotNil(t, result)
   368→	assert.True(t, result.Success)
   369→	assert.NotNil(t, result.HealingSummary)
   370→	assert.True(t, result.HealingSummary.Enabled)
   371→	assert.Greater(t, result.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount, 0)
   372→
   373→	// Debug: print healing summary details
   374→	if result.HealingSummary != nil {
   375→		t.Logf("Healing Summary: Enabled=%t, AttemptsCount=%d, FinalSuccess=%t, Winner=%v",
   376→			result.HealingSummary.Enabled, result.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount,
   377→			result.HealingSummary.FinalSuccess, result.HealingSummary.Winner != nil)
   378→		if result.HealingSummary.Winner != nil {
   379→			t.Logf("Winner: %+v", *result.HealingSummary.Winner)
   380→		}
   381→		t.Logf("All results count: %d", len(result.HealingSummary.AllResults))
   382→	}
   383→
   384→	assert.True(t, result.HealingSummary.FinalSuccess)
   385→}
   386→
   387→func TestSelfHealingBoundedRetries(t *testing.T) {
   388→	// Test that healing respects max_retries limit
   389→	config := &TransflowConfig{
   390→		ID:         "test-bounded",
   391→		TargetRepo: "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git",
   392→		BaseRef:    "refs/heads/main",
   393→		SelfHeal: &SelfHealConfig{
   394→			MaxRetries: 1, // Only one retry allowed
   395→			Enabled:    true,
   396→		},
   397→		Steps: []TransflowStep{
   398→			{Type: "recipe", ID: "test-recipe", Engine: "openrewrite", Recipes: []string{"com.test.Recipe"}},
   399→		},
   400→	}
   401→
   402→	mockBuild := NewHealingMockBuildChecker()
   403→	mockBuild.BuildError = errors.New("persistent build failure")
   404→
   405→	// Create mock job submitter that always fails
   406→	mockJobSubmitter := &MockJobSubmitter{
   407→		SubmitError: errors.New("healing job failed"),
   408→	}
   409→
   410→	runner, err := NewTransflowRunner(config, "/tmp/test")
   411→	require.NoError(t, err)
   412→
   413→	runner.SetGitOperations(&MockGitOperations{})
   414→	runner.SetRecipeExecutor(&MockRecipeExecutor{})
   415→	runner.SetBuildChecker(mockBuild)
   416→	runner.SetJobSubmitter(mockJobSubmitter)
   417→
   418→	ctx := context.Background()
   419→	result, err := runner.Run(ctx)
   420→
   421→	// Should fail after exhausting retries
   422→	assert.Error(t, err)
   423→	if result != nil && result.HealingSummary != nil {
   424→		// Should have attempted exactly max_retries times
   425→		assert.Equal(t, 1, result.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount)
   426→		assert.False(t, result.HealingSummary.FinalSuccess)
   427→	}
   428→}
   429→
   430→// Helper functions for testing
   431→
   432→func parseTestConfigYAML(yamlContent string) (*TransflowConfig, error) {
   433→	// Create temporary file with test content
   434→	tmpFile, err := os.CreateTemp("", "transflow-test-*.yaml")
   435→	if err != nil {
   436→		return nil, err
   437→	}
   438→	defer os.Remove(tmpFile.Name())
   439→
   440→	if err := os.WriteFile(tmpFile.Name(), []byte(yamlContent), 0644); err != nil {
   441→		return nil, err
   442→	}
   443→
   444→	return LoadConfig(tmpFile.Name())
   445→}
   446→
   447→// Enhanced MockBuildChecker for healing tests (extends the one from runner_test.go)
   448→type HealingMockBuildChecker struct {
   449→	*MockBuildChecker
   450→	buildResults []*common.DeployResult
   451→	callCount    int
   452→}
   453→
   454→func NewHealingMockBuildChecker() *HealingMockBuildChecker {
   455→	return &HealingMockBuildChecker{
   456→		MockBuildChecker: &MockBuildChecker{},
   457→	}
   458→}
   459→
   460→func (m *HealingMockBuildChecker) CheckBuild(ctx context.Context, config common.DeployConfig) (*common.DeployResult, error) {
   461→	m.BuildCalled = true
   462→	m.BuildConfig = config
   463→
   464→	if m.buildResults != nil && m.callCount < len(m.buildResults) {
   465→		result := m.buildResults[m.callCount]
   466→		m.callCount++
   467→		if !result.Success {
   468→			return result, errors.New(result.Message)
   469→		}
   470→		return result, nil
   471→	}
   472→
   473→	// Fall back to base MockBuildChecker behavior
   474→	return m.MockBuildChecker.CheckBuild(ctx, config)
   475→}

1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"testing"
     7→	"time"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    10→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
    11→)
    12→
    13→// Mock job submission interfaces for testing - move these to top of file
    14→// to be available to all parts of the package
    15→type MockJobSubmitter struct {
    16→	SubmitError   error
    17→	WaitError     error
    18→	CollectError  error
    19→	SubmitCalled  bool
    20→	WaitCalled    bool
    21→	CollectCalled bool
    22→	SubmittedJobs []JobSpec
    23→	JobResults    map[string]JobResult
    24→	ArtifactPaths map[string]string
    25→}
    26→
    27→// JobSpec and JobResult types are now defined in types.go
    28→
    29→func (m *MockJobSubmitter) SubmitAndWaitTerminal(ctx context.Context, spec JobSpec) (JobResult, error) {
    30→	m.SubmitCalled = true
    31→	m.SubmittedJobs = append(m.SubmittedJobs, spec)
    32→
    33→	if m.SubmitError != nil {
    34→		return JobResult{}, m.SubmitError
    35→	}
    36→
    37→	// Return mock result
    38→	result := JobResult{
    39→		JobID:    fmt.Sprintf("job-%s-%d", spec.Name, time.Now().Unix()),
    40→		Status:   "completed",
    41→		Duration: 30 * time.Second,
    42→	}
    43→
    44→	if mockResult, exists := m.JobResults[spec.Name]; exists {
    45→		result = mockResult
    46→	}
    47→
    48→	return result, m.WaitError
    49→}
    50→
    51→func (m *MockJobSubmitter) CollectArtifacts(ctx context.Context, jobID string, outputDir string) (map[string]string, error) {
    52→	m.CollectCalled = true
    53→
    54→	if m.CollectError != nil {
    55→		return nil, m.CollectError
    56→	}
    57→
    58→	if artifacts, exists := m.ArtifactPaths[jobID]; exists {
    59→		return map[string]string{"plan.json": artifacts}, nil
    60→	}
    61→
    62→	return map[string]string{}, nil
    63→}
    64→
    65→// Test job submission helpers
    66→func TestSubmitPlannerJob(t *testing.T) {
    67→	tests := []struct {
    68→		name          string
    69→		config        *TransflowConfig
    70→		buildError    string
    71→		expectError   bool
    72→		expectJobType string
    73→	}{
    74→		{
    75→			name: "successful planner submission",
    76→			config: &TransflowConfig{
    77→				ID:         "test-workflow",
    78→				TargetRepo: "https://github.com/test/repo",
    79→				BaseRef:    "main",
    80→			},
    81→			buildError:    "compilation failed: undefined symbol",
    82→			expectError:   false,
    83→			expectJobType: "planner",
    84→		},
    85→		{
    86→			name: "planner submission with job failure",
    87→			config: &TransflowConfig{
    88→				ID:         "failing-workflow",
    89→				TargetRepo: "https://github.com/test/repo",
    90→				BaseRef:    "main",
    91→			},
    92→			buildError:    "build timeout",
    93→			expectError:   true,
    94→			expectJobType: "planner",
    95→		},
    96→	}
    97→
    98→	for _, tt := range tests {
    99→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   100→			// This test will fail until we implement SubmitPlannerJob
   101→			ctx := context.Background()
   102→			mockSubmitter := &MockJobSubmitter{
   103→				JobResults:    make(map[string]JobResult),
   104→				ArtifactPaths: make(map[string]string),
   105→			}
   106→
   107→			if tt.expectError {
   108→				mockSubmitter.SubmitError = fmt.Errorf("job submission failed")
   109→			} else {
   110→				mockSubmitter.JobResults["planner"] = JobResult{
   111→					JobID:  "planner-123",
   112→					Status: "completed",
   113→					Output: `{"plan_id": "test-plan", "options": [{"id": "opt1", "type": "llm-exec"}]}`,
   114→				}
   115→				mockSubmitter.ArtifactPaths["planner-123"] = "/tmp/plan.json"
   116→			}
   117→
   118→			submitter := NewJobSubmissionHelper(mockSubmitter)
   119→
   120→			// This function doesn't exist yet - will cause compilation failure
   121→			plan, err := submitter.SubmitPlannerJob(ctx, tt.config, tt.buildError, "/tmp/workspace")
   122→
   123→			if tt.expectError {
   124→				assert.Error(t, err)
   125→				assert.Nil(t, plan)
   126→			} else {
   127→				assert.NoError(t, err)
   128→				assert.NotNil(t, plan)
   129→				assert.Equal(t, "test-plan", plan.PlanID)
   130→				assert.Len(t, plan.Options, 1)
   131→			}
   132→
   133→			assert.True(t, mockSubmitter.SubmitCalled)
   134→			require.Len(t, mockSubmitter.SubmittedJobs, 1)
   135→			assert.Equal(t, tt.expectJobType, mockSubmitter.SubmittedJobs[0].Type)
   136→		})
   137→	}
   138→}
   139→
   140→func TestSubmitReducerJob(t *testing.T) {
   141→	tests := []struct {
   142→		name          string
   143→		planID        string
   144→		branchResults []BranchResult
   145→		winner        *BranchResult
   146→		expectError   bool
   147→	}{
   148→		{
   149→			name:   "successful reducer submission",
   150→			planID: "test-plan-123",
   151→			branchResults: []BranchResult{
   152→				{ID: "branch-1", Status: "completed", Notes: "success"},
   153→				{ID: "branch-2", Status: "failed", Notes: "timeout"},
   154→			},
   155→			winner:      &BranchResult{ID: "branch-1", Status: "completed"},
   156→			expectError: false,
   157→		},
   158→		{
   159→			name:   "reducer with all failed branches",
   160→			planID: "failed-plan-456",
   161→			branchResults: []BranchResult{
   162→				{ID: "branch-1", Status: "failed", Notes: "error"},
   163→				{ID: "branch-2", Status: "failed", Notes: "timeout"},
   164→			},
   165→			winner:      nil,
   166→			expectError: false, // Reducer should still process failure case
   167→		},
   168→	}
   169→
   170→	for _, tt := range tests {
   171→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   172→			ctx := context.Background()
   173→			mockSubmitter := &MockJobSubmitter{
   174→				JobResults:    make(map[string]JobResult),
   175→				ArtifactPaths: make(map[string]string),
   176→			}
   177→
   178→			// Mock reducer result
   179→			mockSubmitter.JobResults["reducer"] = JobResult{
   180→				JobID:  "reducer-789",
   181→				Status: "completed",
   182→				Output: `{"action": "stop", "notes": "workflow completed"}`,
   183→			}
   184→			mockSubmitter.ArtifactPaths["reducer-789"] = "/tmp/next.json"
   185→
   186→			submitter := NewJobSubmissionHelper(mockSubmitter)
   187→
   188→			// This function doesn't exist yet - will cause compilation failure
   189→			nextAction, err := submitter.SubmitReducerJob(ctx, tt.planID, tt.branchResults, tt.winner, "/tmp/workspace")
   190→
   191→			if tt.expectError {
   192→				assert.Error(t, err)
   193→			} else {
   194→				assert.NoError(t, err)
   195→				assert.NotNil(t, nextAction)
   196→				assert.Equal(t, "stop", nextAction.Action)
   197→			}
   198→
   199→			assert.True(t, mockSubmitter.SubmitCalled)
   200→			require.Len(t, mockSubmitter.SubmittedJobs, 1)
   201→			assert.Equal(t, "reducer", mockSubmitter.SubmittedJobs[0].Type)
   202→		})
   203→	}
   204→}
   205→
   206→// Test fanout orchestration
   207→func TestRunHealingFanout(t *testing.T) {
   208→	tests := []struct {
   209→		name         string
   210→		branches     []BranchSpec
   211→		maxParallel  int
   212→		expectWinner bool
   213→		expectError  bool
   214→	}{
   215→		{
   216→			name: "successful fanout with winner",
   217→			branches: []BranchSpec{
   218→				{ID: "human-step", Type: "human", Inputs: map[string]interface{}{"timeout": "1h"}},
   219→				{ID: "llm-fix", Type: "llm-exec", Inputs: map[string]interface{}{"model": "gpt-4"}},
   220→				{ID: "orw-gen", Type: "orw-generated", Inputs: map[string]interface{}{"recipe": "java17"}},
   221→			},
   222→			maxParallel:  3,
   223→			expectWinner: true,
   224→			expectError:  false,
   225→		},
   226→		{
   227→			name: "fanout with all branches failing",
   228→			branches: []BranchSpec{
   229→				{ID: "llm-fix", Type: "llm-exec", Inputs: map[string]interface{}{"model": "gpt-4"}},
   230→				{ID: "orw-gen", Type: "orw-generated", Inputs: map[string]interface{}{"recipe": "java17"}},
   231→			},
   232→			maxParallel:  2,
   233→			expectWinner: false,
   234→			expectError:  true,
   235→		},
   236→		{
   237→			name: "fanout with parallelism limit",
   238→			branches: []BranchSpec{
   239→				{ID: "branch-1", Type: "llm-exec"},
   240→				{ID: "branch-2", Type: "llm-exec"},
   241→				{ID: "branch-3", Type: "llm-exec"},
   242→				{ID: "branch-4", Type: "llm-exec"},
   243→			},
   244→			maxParallel:  2, // Should limit to 2 concurrent
   245→			expectWinner: true,
   246→			expectError:  false,
   247→		},
   248→	}
   249→
   250→	for _, tt := range tests {
   251→		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   252→			ctx := context.Background()
   253→			mockSubmitter := &MockJobSubmitter{
   254→				JobResults:    make(map[string]JobResult),
   255→				ArtifactPaths: make(map[string]string),
   256→			}
   257→
   258→			// Configure mock results based on test expectations
   259→			if tt.expectWinner {
   260→				// Make first branch succeed
   261→				mockSubmitter.JobResults[tt.branches[0].ID] = JobResult{
   262→					JobID:  "job-success-123",
   263→					Status: "completed",
   264→					Output: "success",
   265→				}
   266→			} else {
   267→				// Make all branches fail
   268→				for _, branch := range tt.branches {
   269→					mockSubmitter.JobResults[branch.ID] = JobResult{
   270→						JobID:  fmt.Sprintf("job-fail-%s", branch.ID),
   271→						Status: "failed",
   272→						Output: "failed",
   273→					}
   274→				}
   275→			}
   276→
   277→			orchestrator := NewFanoutOrchestrator(mockSubmitter)
   278→
   279→			// This function doesn't exist yet - will cause compilation failure
   280→			winner, results, err := orchestrator.RunHealingFanout(ctx, nil, tt.branches, tt.maxParallel)
   281→
   282→			if tt.expectError {
   283→				assert.Error(t, err)
   284→				assert.Equal(t, BranchResult{}, winner)
   285→			} else {
   286→				assert.NoError(t, err)
   287→				if tt.expectWinner {
   288→					assert.NotEqual(t, BranchResult{}, winner)
   289→					assert.Equal(t, "completed", winner.Status)
   290→				}
   291→			}
   292→
   293→			assert.Len(t, results, len(tt.branches))
   294→
   295→			// Verify parallelism was respected
   296→			if len(tt.branches) > tt.maxParallel {
   297→				// Should have submitted at most maxParallel jobs
   298→				assert.LessOrEqual(t, len(mockSubmitter.SubmittedJobs), tt.maxParallel)
   299→			}
   300→		})
   301→	}
   302→}
   303→
   304→// Test runner integration
   305→func TestTransflowRunnerWithHealing(t *testing.T) {
   306→	t.Run("healing triggered on build failure", func(t *testing.T) {
   307→		// Setup
   308→		config := &TransflowConfig{
   309→			ID:         "healing-test",
   310→			TargetRepo: "https://github.com/test/repo",
   311→			BaseRef:    "main",
   312→			SelfHeal: &SelfHealConfig{
   313→				MaxRetries: 2,
   314→				Enabled:    true,
   315→			},
   316→			Steps: []TransflowStep{
   317→				{Type: "recipe", ID: "java-migration", Engine: "openrewrite", Recipes: []string{"Java11to17"}},
   318→			},
   319→		}
   320→
   321→		// Mocks
   322→		mockGit := &MockGitOperations{}
   323→		mockRecipe := &MockRecipeExecutor{}
   324→		mockBuild := &MockBuildChecker{
   325→			// First build fails, triggering healing
   326→			BuildError: fmt.Errorf("compilation failed: undefined symbol"),
   327→		}
   328→		mockJobSubmitter := &MockJobSubmitter{
   329→			JobResults: map[string]JobResult{
   330→				"planner": {JobID: "plan-123", Status: "completed", Output: `{"plan_id": "p1", "options": [{"id": "llm1", "type": "llm-exec"}]}`},
   331→				"llm1":    {JobID: "llm-123", Status: "completed", Output: "diff applied successfully"},
   332→				"reducer": {JobID: "red-123", Status: "completed", Output: `{"action": "stop", "notes": "healed"}`},
   333→			},
   334→		}
   335→
   336→		runner, err := NewTransflowRunner(config, "/tmp/workspace")
   337→		require.NoError(t, err)
   338→
   339→		runner.SetGitOperations(mockGit)
   340→		runner.SetRecipeExecutor(mockRecipe)
   341→		runner.SetBuildChecker(mockBuild)
   342→
   343→		// This integration doesn't exist yet - will need to add healing to runner
   344→		runner.SetJobSubmitter(mockJobSubmitter)
   345→
   346→		// Execute
   347→		ctx := context.Background()
   348→		result, err := runner.Run(ctx)
   349→
   350→		// Verify healing was attempted
   351→		assert.NoError(t, err)
   352→		assert.NotNil(t, result)
   353→		assert.NotNil(t, result.HealingSummary)
   354→		assert.True(t, result.HealingSummary.Enabled)
   355→		assert.Greater(t, result.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount, 0)
   356→
   357→		// Verify job submissions happened
   358→		assert.True(t, mockJobSubmitter.SubmitCalled)
   359→		assert.Greater(t, len(mockJobSubmitter.SubmittedJobs), 0)
   360→	})
   361→}
   362→
   363→// All types and interfaces are now defined in types.go and implemented in job_submission.go and fanout_orchestrator.go
   364→
